titleStmt.title: SII 15.177: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 177. (B.K. No. 68 of 1928-29.) BĀḶGI, HUNGUND TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a wall of the temple of Kēśavadēva.
This is dated the 45th regnal year of the King, Śubhakṛit, Dvitīya-Bhādrapadaamāvāsyā, Friday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1242 A.D. September 26.

It records the gift of land, garden, oil-mill, shop, etc., for the enjoyment of the god Vikramāditya-Kēśava of the excellent agrahāra of Bāḍige, made in the presence of Vīrarasa, son of Mallarasa, and others by Janārdhana-bhaṭṭa and his grandfather whose name is not clear. The inscription is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti
siṁghaṇadēvavaruṣada 45 neya śubhakritu saṁvatsarada dvitīya
bhādrapada bahuḷa Amāśe sukravāra sūryyagrahaṇadalu svasti śrīma
duttamada mahāgrahāraṁ bāḍigeya śrīmanu mahāprabhu gaḍiyaṁ
ka bhīma mallarasana kaiyalu gaṁḍevāṁnyadoḷagīśāṁnyadalu mūligavāṁ
nyadiṁ paḍuvala baḍagalāsugeyāgi śrīmatu sāvāsi vaduhi
kraya dhāreyiṁ paḍedu bhōgisuve taṁna mattaru 49 ṟoḷaga
yalu mūligavāṁnyadiṁ paḍuvaliṁ nēsaṟosugeya
śrī vikramādityakēśavadēvarggoṁdu tteyaṁ koṭṭa mattaru 12
mattaṁ Avara maṁma janārddanabhaṭṭa koṭṭa matta 2 Aṁntu mattaru 14 maṁ prabhu ga
ḍageyaṁ baḍagalu tōṭa māṇikēsvarada matta 1 Ā dēvariṁ
teṁkalu pauḷiyiṁdoḷage mane 1 Āpauḷiyiṁ pattida poṟage yīśāṁnya
dalu ge yaṁgaḍi 1 vāṇikhēṇiyokkaliṁge caitradalu
pavitradalu bēḷe ragradapūje hāga pratyēka gāṇakke paḷigaiyeṁṇne hi
voṁdu maḍake . mattā dēvara catrake gauḍageṟeyiṁ mūḍalu
rigeya kōla matta 4 dēvaraṁgaḍiyiṁ rājabīdiyiṁ mūḍalu maneya
vāgiliṁ taṁka�saya gāṇa 1 yiṁtinitumanā śrīmanmahāpra
dhāna mallarasana maga vīrarasananeṁṭu hiṭṭu sthāna māṁnyakāṟara samakṣadalu
kala naṭṭu śāsanava barasi sarbabādhāparihāravāgi punarddhāreya koṭṭa [.]
mūliga sātigauṁḍaṁ taṁna mūligavāṁnyadoḷage kalidēvara hālumaṁ
ḍageya keyiṁ baḍagalu śrīkēśavadēvara hālumaṁḍagege sarbbabādhe parihā
ravāgi koṭṭa matta 2 © Ā bāḍageya mahājanaṁgaḷa kālukaḷci taggiyalu mo
paḍuvaṇa haḷḷadiṁ pattida paḍuva hotōṭa māṇikēśvarada matta 1
© gaṁṇyaṁtē pāṁsavō bhūmērggaṇyaṁtē jalabiṁdavaḥ na gaṇyatē vidhātrāpi
dharmmasaṁrakṣaṇāphalaṁ . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānātsrēyōnupāla
naṁ dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . śrīmanmahājanaṁgaḷu tāvumire pūjāriya dēvara śrīkāryya
kke naḍasuvaru ©
Digital edition of SII 15.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
